session.user: Run the following command from the repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report results: ``` make lint ty ```
session.assistant: I'll run the `make lint ty` command from the repository root and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make lint ty to check code quality

session.tool_result: uv run ruff check All checks passed! uv run ty check All checks passed!
session.assistant:
ruff passed: All checks passed!
ty passed: All checks passed!
Both linting and type checking tools passed successfully with no violations or errors found.
